subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abhá! That which was written hath been witnessed, and that which was recorded hath become known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی آنچه مرقوم شده بود مشهود گشت و هرچه مسطور بود معلوم گردید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual transformation, @review of publications
